title: senml: decode buffer overflow check may reject valid input
notes:
Commit: 021be1669
decode() already returns CborError::BufferTooSmall(n_recs, buf.len()) when n_recs > buf.len() (with From impl). Consistent with encoder. Distinguishes buffer size from invalid CBOR. P2 fixed.
close_reason: BufferTooSmall error used for insufficient buf; commit 021be1669
